case_title: SALAMA SHAFI VS. SOCIETE AIR FRANCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAFI, SALAMA SERVED SEP-20-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERVICES COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF SALAMA SHAFI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOCIETE AIR FRANCE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KONINKLIJKE LUCHTVAART MAATSCHAPPII N.V. IS NOT PRESENT. COURT FINDS THERE ARE VALID PROOFS OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
